lessons.title: Reading Data from CSV and Text Files
lessons.description: Learn to import data from CSV and other text files using base R and readr.

lessons.title: Reading Excel and Other Formats
lessons.description: Import Excel files, SPSS, SAS, and other statistical software formats.

lessons.title: Writing Data and Saving Output
lessons.description: Export data to CSV, Excel, RDS, and save your workspace.

lessons.title: Final Project Part 1: Data Import and Cleaning
lessons.description: Apply your skills to import a real dataset and clean it for analysis.

lessons.title: Final Project Part 2: Analysis and Visualization
lessons.description: Analyze the cleaned data, create visualizations, and draw conclusions.
